channel.title: Manipulation on Mohammad Ali Zamani
channel.description: Recent content in Manipulation on Mohammad Ali Zamani

item.title: 1) European Researchers' Night:
item.description: We demonstrated our project “ robot that learns how to perform language instructions” in ‘Science is Wonder-ful!’, on September 26-27 2018. Our project shows the ability of robots to understand spoken instructions which was working a noisy condition.You can see more details here. I explained our project to Dimitrios Papadimoulis, Vice President of the European Parliament. (Image credit: European Comission - MSCA) You can find the video here:
